name: Arimoclomol slowed NPC disease progression in a randomized phase 2/3 trial
summary: The strongest human functional signal for this track is the NPC arimoclomol phase 2/3 trial.
statement: In a 12-month randomized phase 2/3 NPC trial, arimoclomol slowed progression on the 5-domain NPC Clinical Severity Scale compared with placebo.
population_or_model: Pediatric Niemann-Pick disease type C patients, many receiving background miglustat
quantitative_note: Mean progression was 0.76 with arimoclomol versus 2.15 with placebo; treatment difference -1.40, 95% CI -2.76 to -0.03, P=0.046.
caveats: This is rare-disease neurological evidence, not broad healthy-aging or LEV-relevant evidence.
The trial was small because NPC is rare.
The source reports industry involvement and treatment-related hypersensitivity events.
